mapper.select: SELECT * FROM answer_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM answer_record WHERE exercise_id = #{exerciseId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM answer_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_correct = #{isCorrect} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM answer_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND exercise_id = #{exerciseId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
